extDescription.message: Record the current tab's audio locally as a WebM/Opus file. No uploads, no microphone, no tracking.

cmdToggleRecording.message: Start / stop recording the current tab's audio

settingAutoPause.message: Auto-pause recording when the tab is muted

msgConvertingMp3.message: Converting to MP3… long recordings may take a moment.

errTranscodeFailed.message: Couldn't convert to MP3. You can export as WebM instead.

msgStarted.message: Recording started. Closing the popup won't stop it.

msgPaused.message: Recording paused. The page keeps playing audio.

confirmResetDefault.message: Reset? This clears all state and returns to idle.

confirmResetRecording.message: Recording is in progress. Resetting will stop and discard it. Continue?

confirmResetReady.message: Discard this recording that hasn't been exported yet? This cannot be undone.

msgResetDone.message: Reset done. You can start a new recording.

errNoBackendResponse.message: The extension background did not return a valid response.

notifyStoppedSaved.message: Ready: $file$. Open the extension to export.

notifyStoppedOpen.message: Open the extension to see the status.

notifyReadyPendingTitle.message: A recording is waiting to export

notifyReadyPendingBody.message: Export or discard it before starting a new recording.

notifyPausedBody.message: The page keeps playing. Press the shortcut again to resume.

notifyResumedBody.message: Continuing to write tab audio to the file.

noticeAutoStopped.message: The recording target ended (tab closed or audio stream interrupted). The recording was saved automatically — please export it.

errOffscreenStopFailed.message: The offscreen document failed to stop recording.

errAlreadyRecording.message: A recording is already in progress.

errReadyPending.message: A recording is waiting to export. Export it before starting a new one.

errTabMuted.message: The current tab is muted. Unmute it before recording.

warnTabSilent.message: No audio detected on this tab yet. Recording will continue once it starts playing.

errNoActiveContent.message: Nothing is being recorded right now.

errNotPaused.message: The recording is not currently paused.

msgNoOngoingRecording.message: There is no recording in progress.

errStopNotReceived.message: The recorder did not receive the stop request. Reopen the extension and try again.

errStoppedNoFile.message: Recording stopped, but no downloadable file was produced.

errNothingToExportYet.message: No recording file to export. Finish a recording first.

errStopTimeout.message: Timed out waiting for the recording file. Check the service worker / offscreen error logs on the extension details page.

errBlockedPage.message: Browser-internal or extension pages can't be recorded. Switch to a video/livestream page first.

errMissingDownloadInfo.message: The recording result is missing download information.

errDownloadFailed.message: Browser download failed: $primary$; fallback download failed: $fallback$

errCannotAccessPage.message: This page can't be accessed by the extension. Switch to a normal web page and try again.

errCannotCapture.message: Couldn't capture this tab's audio. Make sure you started from a video/livestream page and that the browser allows tab capture.

errNeedUserGesture.message: Start recording from the extension popup — the browser requires recording to be triggered by a user action.

errOffscreenUnknownCommand.message: The offscreen document received an unknown command.

errAlreadyRecordingInProgress.message: A recording is already in progress.

errNoDataToSave.message: Recording already stopped; no recording data was found to save.

errDownloadUrlExpired.message: The recording download URL has expired.
